# Shakespeare Family Genealogy

## Description
Family genealogy of William Shakespeare and the Shakespeare family in GEDCOM 5.5.1 format. Contains the family tree of the famous English playwright and poet, including family relationships, dates, and biographical information.

## Test Case Type
- **Real historical family**: Genealogy of well-documented historical figures
- **Literary genealogy testing**: Tests handling of famous personalities
- **Historical accuracy**: Based on documented historical research
- **Small-to-medium genealogy file**: Good for unit and integration testing

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5.1
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~6.6 KB
- **Encoding**: US-ASCII
- **Source Software**: webtreeprint.com

## Provenance
- **Source**: Webtreeprint.com Famous GEDCOMs
- **URL**: https://webtreeprint.com/tp_famous_gedcoms.php
- **Availability**: Public genealogy resources
- **Accuracy**: Based on documented historical research
- **Collection Date**: Contemporary genealogy databases

## License & Usage
- **License**: Public genealogy data
- **Attribution**: webtreeprint.com
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: Standard genealogy data restrictions apply

## Testing Coverage
- Historical genealogical data
- ASCII character encoding
- Family relationships and biographical records
- Smaller file size suitable for quick testing
- Real-world genealogy software output

## Notes
- Good for testing with real historical data
- Smaller file size makes it useful for quick regression testing
- ASCII encoding provides simple encoding testing
- Demonstrates output from webtreeprint genealogy software
- Perfect for validation testing with known historical figures
- Suitable for both positive and edge-case testing scenarios
